tools.name: extract
tools.description: URL -> main content as clean markdown (JS-rendered, real browser). Input: {url} — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: render
tools.description: URL -> full HTML after JavaScript execution. Input: {url} — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: URL -> PNG screenshot. Input: {url, fullPage?} — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: pdf
tools.description: URL -> PDF (A4, backgrounds). Input: {url} — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: links
tools.description: URL -> deduplicated links, internal/external with anchor text. Input: {url} — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: meta
tools.description: URL -> SEO meta, OpenGraph, canonical, JSON-LD. Input: {url} — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_entreprise
tools.description: French company lookup by name or SIREN/SIRET: officers, NAF, HQ, status. Query: ?q= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_geocode
tools.description: Geocode any French address incl. overseas territories (lat/lon, score). Query: ?q= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: dns
tools.description: Full DNS records for a domain: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, SPF. Query: ?domain= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: email_validate
tools.description: Email validation: syntax + domain MX check, no email sent. Query: ?email= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_tva
tools.description: Compute French intra-EU VAT number from a SIREN (offline, instant). Query: ?siren= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_vat-eu
tools.description: Validate any EU VAT number via the official VIES service, returns trader name/address. Query: ?vat= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_commune
tools.description: French commune info: population, INSEE code, postal codes, EPCI, department, region, coords. Query: ?q= or ?cp= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_reverse-geocode
tools.description: Reverse geocode lat/lon to a French address (incl. overseas). Query: ?lat=&lon= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_jours-feries
tools.description: French public holidays for a year and zone (metropole, alsace-moselle, guadeloupe, etc.). Query: ?annee=&zone= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_georisques
tools.description: Natural & technological risks for a French commune (flood, seismic, industrial...). Query: ?insee= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_carburants
tools.description: Live fuel prices at stations near a French postal code (gazole, SP95/98, E85, GPL). Query: ?cp= — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_etablissements
tools.description: French company HQ + establishment counts by SIREN (SIRET, address, status). Query: ?siren= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_association
tools.description: Search French associations (RNA) by name: SIREN, RNA id, creation date, city. Query: ?q= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_dpe
tools.description: Energy performance diagnostics (DPE/GES labels) for dwellings in a French area. Query: ?insee= or ?cp= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_vacances-scolaires
tools.description: French school holidays by zone and year. Query: ?zone=&annee= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_ecoles
tools.description: French schools directory lookup by name or postal code (type, status, address, phone). Query: ?q= or ?cp= — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_iban
tools.description: Validate an IBAN (mod-97 checksum), returns country and French bank code. Query: ?iban= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_codes-postaux
tools.description: Map a French postal code to its communes (name + INSEE code). Query: ?cp= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_cadastre
tools.description: French cadastral parcel at given coordinates: parcel id, section, number, surface (IGN). Query: ?lat=&lon= — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_valeurs-foncieres
tools.description: Real French real-estate sale prices (DVF) for a commune: date, price, surface, type. Query: ?insee=&annee= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_insee-commune
tools.description: INSEE commune stats: population, area, computed density, department, region, EPCI. Query: ?insee= — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_meteo
tools.description: Current weather + up to 7-day forecast for any coordinates (France & overseas), French descriptions. Query: ?lat=&lon=&jours= — $0.005/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_rge
tools.description: RGE-certified renovation contractors near a French postal code (name, trade, phone, email). Query: ?cp=&domaine= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_rge-check
tools.description: Check whether a French company (by SIRET) is RGE-certified, with its qualifications. Query: ?siret= — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_transport
tools.description: Public-transit & mobility open datasets for a French area with GTFS/NeTEx/GBFS feed URLs. Query: ?q= — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_irve
tools.description: EV charging stations in a French commune: operator, power, connectors, access, coords (IRVE). Query: ?insee= — $0.01/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_bodacc
tools.description: BODACC legal announcements for a French company by SIREN (filings, sales, insolvency, changes). Query: ?siren= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_bio
tools.description: Certified organic (AB) operators in France by department and/or text search: farms, processors, productions. Query: ?departement=&q= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_entreprise-360
tools.description: Full French company report in ONE call: identity, VAT, HQ, officers, establishments, finances, legal notices (BODACC), RGE cert. Aggregates 3 sources. Free trial: /free/entreprise-360. Query: ?q= or ?siren= — $0.04/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_estimation-immo
tools.description: Real-estate price estimate (AVM) computed from real DVF sale comparables: €/m² median + range and value for a surface. Free trial: /free/estimation-immo. Query: ?adresse=&surface=&type=appartement|maison — $0.05/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_bilans
tools.description: French company annual accounts & financial statements (revenue, net income, capital) + list of filed accounts, via INPI RNE (auth-gated source). Query: ?siren= — $0.06/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_score-entreprise
tools.description: Company solidity/risk score 0-100 for a French company: crosses INPI financials (revenue/profit trend), BODACC legal proceedings, age, status. Replaces a paid solvency report. Free trial: /free/score-entreprise. Query: ?q= or ?siren= — $0.08/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_analyse-immo
tools.description: Real-estate investment scorecard for an address: DVF value estimate + energy (DPE) + natural risks + demographics + rental yield estimate. Query: ?adresse=&surface=&type=appartement|maison — $0.08/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_kyb
tools.description: Know-Your-Business compliance dossier for a French company in one call: identity, VAT + VIES validation, officers, financial health (INPI), legal proceedings (BODACC), risk verdict. Free trial: /free/kyb. Query: ?q= or ?siren= — $0.10/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_etude-implantation
tools.description: Business location study: competitor saturation (same activity in commune), demographics, commercial real-estate prices, opportunity score. Query: ?activite=&commune= — $0.12/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_reseau-dirigeant
tools.description: All French companies linked to a person (director search) with active/ceased flags and fraud-risk level. Query: ?nom=&prenom= — $0.08/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_concurrents
tools.description: Competitive landscape of a French company: same-NAF rivals in its area ranked by revenue, with CA position. Query: ?q= or ?siren= &zone=departement|region — $0.08/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_verif-artisan
tools.description: Verify a French contractor before hiring: company health, age, RGE certification, insolvency proceedings, trust level. Query: ?q= or ?siren= — $0.08/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: fr_valorisation
tools.description: Company valuation estimate from public financials (revenue & earnings multiples), with range. Query: ?q= or ?siren= — $0.10/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: uk_company
tools.description: UK company profile (Companies House): status, incorporation, SIC codes, registered office, accounts due dates, insolvency/charges flags. Query: ?q= or ?number= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: uk_officers
tools.description: UK company directors/officers (Companies House): name, role, appointment/resignation, nationality. Query: ?q= or ?number= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: uk_psc
tools.description: UK beneficial owners — Persons with Significant Control (Companies House), key for KYB/AML. Query: ?q= or ?number= — $0.03/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: uk_company-check
tools.description: UK company KYB verdict in one call: status, accounts/filing compliance, insolvency history, officers, beneficial owners. Query: ?q= or ?number= — $0.08/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: us_company
tools.description: US public company profile (SEC EDGAR): name, CIK, tickers, exchange, SIC, state, fiscal year, latest filing. Query: ?ticker= or ?cik= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: us_financials
tools.description: US public company key annual financials from SEC XBRL: revenue, net income, assets, liabilities, equity, cash (3 years). Query: ?ticker= or ?cik= — $0.05/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: us_filings
tools.description: Recent SEC filings for a US company (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K...) with dates and document URLs. Query: ?ticker= or ?cik= &type= — $0.02/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

tools.name: us_snapshot
tools.description: One-call US company financial snapshot: revenue, growth, net income, margin, ROE, profitability from SEC XBRL. Query: ?ticker= or ?cik= — $0.06/call, paid per request via x402 (USDC).

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: email_validate, fr_transport · Private data: dns, us_filings · Public sink: email_validate, fr_rge.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: email_validate, fr_transport · Private data: dns, us_filings · Public sink: email_validate, fr_rge

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
